review.title: Review
review.empty.unstaged.title: No unstaged changes
review.empty.unstaged.description: Edit files to see changes here
review.empty.staged.title: No staged changes
review.empty.staged.description: Run git add to stage changes

review.empty.branch.description: No commits ahead of the tracking branch

review.branchNoUpstreamMsg: No upstream tracking branch configured. Run git push -u to set one.
review.fileTooLarge: File too large to display diff
review.largeDiff: Large file — rendering may be slow
review.highFileCount: {{count}} files — large diff may be slow. All files collapsed by default.
review.expandAllConfirm: This will expand {{count}} files. This may be slow. Continue?
